title: Echeveria angustiflora
taxonomy: Echeveria angustiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. This succulent plant is native to Mexico and belongs to the genus Echeveria. Echeveria angustiflora is typically classified as a member of the Crassuloideae subfamily within the family Crassulaceae. The Crassulaceae family is a group of plants commonly known as the stonecrop or orpine family. Echeveria angustiflora's classification is further supported by its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis.
